name: Jim's Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter an 8-inch square baking dish.
2. In a saucepan, melt together milk, water, and chocolate. Stir in sugar and salt.
3. Over moderate heat, bring the mixture to a soft ball, about 234°F on a candy thermometer, stirring frequently. Keep the bottom of the pan free of lumps.
4. Remove the pan from heat and add peanut butter, vanilla extract, and nuts. Do not stir.
5. When the mixture cools to 150°F, gently stir until it loses its sheen.
6. Quickly turn the mixture into the buttered dish.
7. Allow to firm up before cutting into 1-inch squares.
Makes 64 pieces of fudge
